abstract: Learn about changes to Apple Ads Campaign Management API 4.
overview:
## Overview

API 4 calls are able to access resources created with [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/apple-search-ads-campaign-management-api-5].

### 4.11

Released in April, 2024.

### 4.10

Released in November, 2023.

### 4.9

Released in July, 2023.

Updates to [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource]:

Updates to the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ProductPageReason] object:

### 4.8

Released in April, 2023.

### 4.7

Released in January, 2023.

### 4.6.1

Released in October, 2022.

### 4.6

Released in September, 2022.

Advertisers can book ads using two new ad placements: `APPSTORE_TODAY_TAB` and `APPSTORE_PRODUCT_PAGES_BROWSE`. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].

### 4.4

Released in June, 2022.

### 4.3

Released in April, 2022.

### 4.2

Released in March, 2022.

### 4.1

Released in January, 2022.

[doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/custom-product-pages] replaces Creative Sets functionality. The Apple Ads API no longer supports Creative Sets and `AdGroupCreativeSets`. Creative Sets APIs return `200 OK` responses with an invalid state. Your Creative Sets data remains available through `Get Creative Set-Level Reports`.

Custom Product Pages reports now include [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Ad-Level-Reports], available for campaigns using the `APPSTORE_SEARCH_RESULTS` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].

### 4.0

Released in May, 2021. You can use calls from the 4.x API to access all of your resources that you created in Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API 3.

#### OAuth

Beginning in 2021, the Apple Ads Campaign Management API uses OAuth 2 for API account authentication. Apple Search Ads users no longer use API certificates to manage access to their Search Ads accounts. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/implementing-oauth-for-the-apple-search-ads-api].

To make calls to the Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API with OAuth, see [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/calling-the-apple-search-ads-api].

#### Access Control Lists

Access control lists have the following updates:

#### Ad Groups

The `defaultCpcBid` field in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup] object has been renamed to `defaultBidAmount`.

#### Reports

[doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Campaign] objects now include new fields: [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdChannelType], and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/BillingEventType]. The [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup] object now includes a new field: [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/PricingModel].  Note, in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup] object, the `defaultCpcBid` field used in API 3 is now the `defaultBidAmount` field in API 4.

# Apple Ads Campaign Management API 4

**Article**

Learn about changes to Apple Ads Campaign Management API 4.

## Overview

API 4 calls are able to access resources created with [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/apple-search-ads-campaign-management-api-5].

### 4.11

Released in April, 2024.

- Added guidance for suggested keyword bid amount to help you increase the likelihood of your ad showing in the App Store.  See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/KeywordBidRecommendation] for a summary of changes to [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Keyword-Level-Reports].
- You can now create and update budget orders through the API.  Added two endpoints: [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Budget-Order] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-a-Budget-Order]. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/budget-orders].

### 4.10

Released in November, 2023.

- Added an endpoint to provide app eligibility according to available supply sources, device classes, age criteria, and countries or regions. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-App-Eligibility-Records].
- The [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-Targeting-Keywords-in-a-Campaign] endpoint now supports filtering and sorting by `modificationTime` and `creationTime`.

### 4.9

Released in July, 2023.

Updates to [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource]:

- Campaigns with a Today tab `SupplySource` no longer serve impressions to iPad.
- Removed minimum asset requirements.

Updates to the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ProductPageReason] object:

- Updated ad creative rejection reasons.
- Added a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReasonLevel] to support the ad approval process.



### 4.8

Released in April, 2023.

- Added endpoints to support the ad creative approval process for campaigns using the `APPSTORE_TODAY_TAB` or `APPSTORE_SEARCH_RESULTS` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].
- [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-Ad-Creative-Rejection-Reasons] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Gets-a-product-page-reason] can help you resolve a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ProductPageReason] for rejected ad creatives based on [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/custom-product-pages].
- [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-App-Assets] returns your app asset metadata that may need adjusting.

### 4.7

Released in January, 2023.

- Added [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/impression-share-reports].

### 4.6.1

Released in October, 2022.

- Added a new section on [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/calling-the-apple-search-ads-api#Rate-Limits].
- Updated the script for [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/implementing-oauth-for-the-apple-search-ads-api#Create-a-Client-Secret] in the OAuth procedures.
- Added a new [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-Ad-Groups-(org-level)] endpoint to find ad groups within your organization.
- Added a new [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-Ads-(org-level)] endpoint to find `ads` within your organization.

### 4.6

Released in September, 2022.

Advertisers can book ads using two new ad placements: `APPSTORE_TODAY_TAB` and `APPSTORE_PRODUCT_PAGES_BROWSE`. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].

- `APPSTORE_TODAY_TAB` requires an approved ad creative based on eligible [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/custom-product-pages] (CPPs).
- Your CPP needs to be in the `defaultLanguage` of your campaign. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].
- The default languages of Hong Kong (HK) and Macau (MO) have been updated from `yue-Hant` to `zh-Hant`. Use the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Supported-Countries-or-Regions] endpoint to fetch supported languages and language codes.
- `APPSTORE_PRODUCT_PAGES_BROWSE` places your ad at the top of the You Might Also Like list when users scroll to the bottom of relevant pages across the App Store.
- An optional app categories targeting dimension is eligible to use with `APPSTORE_PRODUCT_PAGES_BROWSE`. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AppCategoryCriteria].

### 4.4

Released in June, 2022.

- Advertisers are able to book campaigns with a cost-per-tap (`CPC`) pricing model and the `APPSTORE_SEARCH_TAB` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].
- The cost-per-thousand-impressions (`CPM`) [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/PricingModel] has been deprecated. You can’t update a `CPM` campaign to a CPC campaign. You must create new campaigns using `CPC`.
- A lifetime budget is now optional. New campaigns require either a `dailyBudgetAmount` or a `budgetAmount` (lifetime budget), or both. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Campaign] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-a-Campaign] for payload examples.
- Campaign `endTime` and `startTime` attributes are now configurable. See the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Campaign] object for validations.

### 4.3

Released in April, 2022.

- Added delete keywords endpoints. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Delete-Targeting-Keywords] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Find-Targeting-Keywords-in-a-Campaign].
- Enhancements to the geolocation search service.

### 4.2

Released in March, 2022.

- Added `creationTime` field to the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Creative], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Ad] object, [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdCreate], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdUpdate], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingAd], and `ReportingCreativeSet`.
- Reports now include [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Keyword-Level-within-Ad-Group-Reports] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Search-Term-Level-within-Ad-Group-Reports].

### 4.1

Released in January, 2022.

[doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/custom-product-pages] replaces Creative Sets functionality. The Apple Ads API no longer supports Creative Sets and `AdGroupCreativeSets`. Creative Sets APIs return `200 OK` responses with an invalid state. Your Creative Sets data remains available through `Get Creative Set-Level Reports`.

Custom Product Pages reports now include [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Ad-Level-Reports], available for campaigns using the `APPSTORE_SEARCH_RESULTS` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].

### 4.0

Released in May, 2021. You can use calls from the 4.x API to access all of your resources that you created in Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API 3.

#### OAuth

Beginning in 2021, the Apple Ads Campaign Management API uses OAuth 2 for API account authentication. Apple Search Ads users no longer use API certificates to manage access to their Search Ads accounts. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/implementing-oauth-for-the-apple-search-ads-api].

To make calls to the Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API with OAuth, see [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/calling-the-apple-search-ads-api].

#### Access Control Lists

Access control lists have the following updates:

- The `parentOrgId` field is a new field in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/UserAcl] object. This distinguishes the account from an `orgId` belonging to a suborganization. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/calling-the-apple-search-ads-api] for details.
- The [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Me-Details] endpoint has been added with its [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/MeDetailResponse] object.
- The `certExpirationDate` field is no longer a property of the `UserAcl` object.

#### Ad Groups

The `defaultCpcBid` field in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup] object has been renamed to `defaultBidAmount`.

#### Reports

[doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Campaign] objects now include new fields: [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdChannelType], and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/BillingEventType]. The [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup] object now includes a new field: [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/PricingModel].  Note, in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup] object, the `defaultCpcBid` field used in API 3 is now the `defaultBidAmount` field in API 4.

- [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Campaign-Level-Reports] returns `supplySources`,  [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdChannelType], `BillingEventType`, and `avgCPM` in the metadata.
- [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Ad-Group-Level-Reports] returns `PricingModel`, `defaultBidAmount`, and `avgCPM` in the metadata.
- [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Keyword-Level-Reports], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Search-Term-Level-Reports], and `Get Creative Set-Level Reports`  aren’t supported with `supplySources` and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdChannelType] fields.

## Changelog

- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 5**: Learn about changes to Apple Ads Campaign Management API 5.
- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 3**: Apple no longer supports this API.
- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 2**: Apple no longer supports this API.
- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 1**: Apple no longer supports this API.
